body_txt: Sometimes, a Spin-Off series ends up becoming more popular than the original that spun it off. See also Adaptation Displacement , where the vast majority of fans are unaware that it started in another medium, as well as Sequel Displacement , Breakup Breakout , Parody Displacement , and Even Better Sequel . Contrast with Quietly Performing Sister Show . If it's a reboot or reimagining that is more popular, it may be a case of Remade and Improved . A No Recent Examples rule applies to this trope . Examples shouldn't be added until six months after the spin-off is released, to avoid any knee-jerk reactions.
